structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-09-04 Additional Update to Nova Advantage DPA 
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-04 07:51:45-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The investor behind the Nova Advantage DPA has implemented further changes to their offerings. Most notable is the addition of a 3-year forgivable option. Please read below for details. 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Down Payment Assistance

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:b:/s/Home/EVepS6Z-RTFNjY6neH8rtCAB2odmPGzTJ-BvptmmfJia7A?e=en5Abd> 

 Training <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:b:/s/Home/Ebir7BFi1gtOiJmsaB6IKwoBpo_ToOM-RzGh-8j7DxHGKA?e=Dz09ws> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	FTHB and repeat buyers permitted
*	No income limits
*	2-1 Buydown available (0.5% LLPA)
*	1-2 units; SFR, PUD, MH (double wide only), condos

	*	3-Year and 5-year forgivable options

		*	Assistance is 3.5% of PP or AV (whichever is less)
		*	640+ FICO 
		*	2nd liens: 0% interest rate, no monthly payments

	*	10-year repayable option

		*	Assistance is 3.5% or 5% of PP or AV (whichever is less)
		*	660+ FICO 
		*	2nd liens: 30- year amortization with 10-year balloon OR 10-year note (8.99% interest rate)

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Subordination, assumptions, or additional liens are not permitted

ATTACHMENTS

*	Nova Advantage matrix

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
